title: Data Quality in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger data quality in practice judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Data Quality in Practice is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Data Quality in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good data quality in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Data Quality in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
